properties.name: app.logging.root-level
properties.description: 应用程序日志的根级别.

properties.name: app.logging.sql.level
properties.description: SQL 日志（仅开发环境）.

properties.name: app.task.log-clean.enabled
properties.description: 日志文件清理定时任务开关.

properties.name: app.task.log-clean.retention-days
properties.description: 日志文件保留天数，超过此天数的文件将被清理任务删除.

properties.name: app.task.log-clean.cron
properties.description: 日志清理定时任务的 Cron 表达式.

properties.name: app.task.temp-clean.enabled
properties.description: 临时文件清理定时任务开关.

properties.name: upload.oss.endpoint
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS 服务端点地址 (Endpoint).

properties.name: upload.oss.access-key-id
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS 访问密钥 ID (AccessKey ID).

properties.name: upload.oss.access-key-secret
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS 访问密钥 (AccessKey Secret).

properties.name: upload.oss.bucket-name
properties.description: 阿里云 OSS 存储桶名称 (Bucket Name).

properties.name: upload.oss.custom-domain
properties.description: 绑定到 OSS 存储桶的自定义域名，用于文件访问.

properties.name: springdoc.info.title
properties.description: OpenAPI 接口文档的标题.

properties.name: springdoc.info.description
properties.description: OpenAPI 接口文档的详细描述.
properties.defaultValue: Nebula 博客系统接口文档

properties.name: springdoc.info.version
properties.description: API 接口的版本号.

properties.name: upload.webp.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用图片上传时自动转换为 WebP 格式的功能.

properties.name: upload.webp.quality
properties.description: WebP 图片的压缩质量，范围在 0.0 到 1.0 之间.

properties.name: upload.webp.max-width
properties.description: 图片处理的最大宽度（像素），超过此值将按比例缩放.

properties.name: upload.webp.max-height
properties.description: 图片处理的最大高度（像素），超过此值将按比例缩放.

properties.name: upload.webp.keep-original
properties.description: 转换为 WebP 后，是否保留原始图片文件.设置为 false 可以节省存储空间.

properties.name: upload.webp.failure-strategy
properties.description: 当图片转换为 WebP 格式失败时的处理策略.

properties.name: upload.webp.enable-stats
properties.description: 是否启用并记录 WebP 转换的统计信息（如成功/失败次数）.

values.description: 转换失败时，保留原始图片文件.
转换失败时，抛出异常，中断上传流程.
调试信息，用于开发阶段.
一般信息，用于报告应用状态.
警告信息，表示潜在问题.
错误信息，表示操作失败但应用仍可运行.
